results.requirement_text: The system shall require a cancellation reason when an approved booking is cancelled.

test_cases.objective: Verify that a cancellation reason is required when cancelling an approved booking
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.expected_result: The system enforces that a cancellation reason must be provided

results.requirement_text: The system shall prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page.

test_cases.title: Prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page
test_cases.objective: Verify that users without administrator permission are blocked from accessing the user management page
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.
A user without administrator permission is attempting to access the user management page.

steps.action: Exercise the configured action under a subject that lacks the stated permission.
steps.expected_result: Verify that the system blocks the action according to the stated restriction.

test_cases.expected_result: The system blocks access to the user management page for users without administrator permission.
assumptions: Exact location or URL of user management page not specified
